problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Photodynamic. Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
